_doc: Batch-tier peers (EVALUATOR_PLAN.md §4.5): external one-shot ternary evaluators, for benchmarks + differential conformance only (never elaboration). Each peer entry is { name, cmd, args } where the binary reads ternary terms on stdin (one per line), left-folds application, and prints the ternary normal form (the lambada run-one.sh contract). In-process disp backends (eager, naive) are BatchRunners via src/eval/batch.ts#sessionBatchRunner and are NOT declared here. No external peers are wired yet — populate this when lambada-tc / tc-evaluator binaries are available locally, and reconcile the 0/1/2 preorder-arity ternary bytes with their conventions/ first.
